record.field: ${(object.team_id and object.team_id.alias_id and object.team_id.alias_id.alias_name + '@' + object.team_id.alias_id.alias_domain) or (user.email_formatted)}

div.p: Thank you for contacting us. We have received your support request and created a ticket for you.

td.style: padding: 8px; background-color: #f8f9fa; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; font-weight: bold;
padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
padding: 8px; background-color: #f8f9fa; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; font-weight: bold;
padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
padding: 8px; background-color: #f8f9fa; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; font-weight: bold;
padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
padding: 8px; background-color: #f8f9fa; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; font-weight: bold;
padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
padding: 8px; background-color: #f8f9fa; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; font-weight: bold;
padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;

div.p: You can view and track your ticket online by clicking the link below:

a.style: background-color: #007bff; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 20px; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 4px; display: inline-block;

div.p: If you have any questions, please reply to this email or contact our support team.

record.field: ${(object.team_id and object.team_id.alias_id and object.team_id.alias_id.alias_name + '@' + object.team_id.alias_id.alias_domain) or (user.email_formatted)}

div.p: The status of your ticket has been updated.

td.style: padding: 8px; background-color: #f8f9fa; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; font-weight: bold;
padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
padding: 8px; background-color: #f8f9fa; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; font-weight: bold;
padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
padding: 8px; background-color: #f8f9fa; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; font-weight: bold;
padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;

div.p: You can view and track your ticket online by clicking the link below:

a.style: background-color: #007bff; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 20px; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 4px; display: inline-block;

record.field: ${(object.team_id and object.team_id.alias_id and object.team_id.alias_id.alias_name + '@' + object.team_id.alias_id.alias_domain) or (user.email_formatted)}

div.p: A new ticket has been assigned to you.

td.style: padding: 8px; background-color: #f8f9fa; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; font-weight: bold;
padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
padding: 8px; background-color: #f8f9fa; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; font-weight: bold;
padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
padding: 8px; background-color: #f8f9fa; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; font-weight: bold;
padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
padding: 8px; background-color: #f8f9fa; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; font-weight: bold;
padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;

div.p: You can view and manage this ticket by clicking the link below:

a.style: background-color: #007bff; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 20px; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 4px; display: inline-block;

record.field: ${(object.team_id and object.team_id.alias_id and object.team_id.alias_id.alias_name + '@' + object.team_id.alias_id.alias_domain) or (user.email_formatted)}

field.name: body_html
field.div:
Dear ${object.partner_id.name or 'Customer'},
                
A new comment has been added to your ticket.
                

                    
                        

                            Ticket Number:
                            ${object.ticket_number}
                        
                        

                            Subject:
                            ${object.name}
                        
                        

                            Status:
                            ${dict(object._fields['state'].selection)[object.state]}
                        
                    
                
                % if ctx.get('message_body'):
                

                    
Comment:
                    
${ctx.get('message_body')}
                
                % endif
                
You can view the comment and reply by clicking the link below, or simply reply to this email:
                

                    View Ticket
                
                

                    You can reply to this email to add a comment to your ticket.
                
                
Best regards,
${user.name}
